---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Personal projects — Erika C. Freeman"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.section-label}
Personal projects
:::
::: {.section-title}
off the clock
:::

The things I make and chase when I'm not at the bench.

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-figure}
![](assets/projects/outside.jpg)
:::
::: {.project-body}
::: {.project-title}
Outside
:::
::: {.project-desc}
Running, climbing, botanising, and exploring the great out-the-door. Adventure and travel logs from trails, ridgelines, and wherever the next race or long way round leads.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-figure}
Table of Contents
:::
::: {.project-body}
::: {.project-title}
Table of Contents
:::
::: {.project-desc}
A recurring themed dinner series with Juli: each edition takes one intellectual theme and teaches it across a multi-course, interactive meal of readings, tastings, and cooking together. CITR·US is the citrus strand.
:::
:::
:::

:::

::: {.personal-link}
[← Back to projects](projects.html)
:::
